mapper.sql: id, item_code, item_name, category, specification, unit, stock_quantity, min_stock, max_stock, location, last_inbound, last_outbound, status, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_warehouse_item WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_warehouse_item ( item_code, item_name, category, specification, unit, stock_quantity, min_stock, max_stock, location, last_inbound, last_outbound, status, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{category}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{stockQuantity}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock}, #{location}, #{lastInbound}, #{lastOutbound}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tbl_warehouse_item
update_time = NOW(), item_code = #{itemCode}, item_name = #{itemName}, category = #{category}, specification = #{specification}, unit = #{unit}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, min_stock = #{minStock}, max_stock = #{maxStock}, location = #{location}, last_inbound = #{lastInbound}, last_outbound = #{lastOutbound}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_warehouse_item SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
